subject: App crashes every time I switch projects

subject: Project switch crash reproducible steps
description: I can reliably reproduce the crash: open app
priority: click on Project B in the sidebar. App freezes for 2 seconds then exits. No autosave. Reproducible 100% of the time.

description: This crash was introduced in version 3.2. Before that version we had no issues. The null pointer in the context handler is clearly a regression from that release.

description: I have been living with this crash for a month. Every time I switch projects I lose what I am working on. The productivity impact is enormous for my team.

subject: Crash report attached - project context handler
description: I have attached a full crash report showing the null pointer exception in the project context handler. This appears to be an uninitialized object on project switch.

subject: Null pointer on project context switch
description: Technical details: the crash occurs in the project context lifecycle handler when switching. The previous project context is not properly disposed before the new one initializes.
